tagline: Full-Service Landscaping Since 1979. Barrington Trusts Us.
hero_subtitle: Over 45 years of lawn maintenance, landscaping, and landscape materials for residential and commercial properties in the Barrington area.
service_area_description: Serving Barrington, Lake Barrington, Deer Park, Hoffman Estates & surrounding northwest suburbs.
seo_title: Down To Earth Landscaping | Landscaping & Materials in Barrington, IL
seo_description: Down To Earth Landscaping in Barrington, IL. 45+ years of lawn maintenance, landscaping, mulch, soil, aggregates, and snow removal services.
services_subtitle: From lawn maintenance to bulk materials — everything your property needs, delivered and installed.
reviews_subtitle: Barrington families and businesses rely on Down To Earth for quality and consistency.
cta_subtitle: Get a free estimate. We'll visit your site, assess your needs, and deliver a detailed proposal.
footer_description: Full-service landscaping and landscape materials since 1979. Mulch, soil, aggregates, nursery products, and complete maintenance programs.

services_featured.name: Lawn Maintenance & Landscaping
services_featured.description: Complete maintenance programs that keep your property pristine year-round. Mowing, aeration, overseeding, and full landscape design.

services_secondary.name: Mulch, Soil & Aggregates
services_secondary.description: Premium bulk materials manufactured on-site. Mulch, topsoil, sand, stone, and gravel for retail and wholesale — delivered to your door.

services_accent.name: Snow Removal
services_accent.description: Reliable commercial and residential snow plowing and salt application to keep your property safe all winter.

services_wide.name: Nursery & Firewood
services_wide.description: Quality nursery products for your landscape projects plus seasoned firewood for your home. Yard waste disposal available.

about_features.title: Barrington Since 1979
about_features.description: Started as a lawn maintenance company and grew into a full-service landscape firm with materials manufacturing and supply.

about_features.title: Materials Manufacturing
about_features.description: We don't just install — we manufacture and supply mulch, soil, and aggregates for retail and wholesale markets.

about_features.title: Complete Property Solutions
about_features.description: From spring aeration to winter snow removal, we keep your property looking its best year-round.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: We've used Down To Earth for over 10 years. Their maintenance program keeps our lawn looking like a golf course. Delivery is always on time.

reviews.name: Property Manager
reviews.text: Their snow removal service is the most reliable we've found. They show up early and the lot is always clear before our tenants arrive.

reviews.name: Landscaper
reviews.text: Best mulch and soil supplier in the area. We buy wholesale for all our projects. Quality is consistent and prices are fair.
